nasb.text: Because he considered and turned away from all his transgressions which he had committed, he shall surely live; he shall not die.

esv.text: Because he considered and turned away from all the transgressions that he had committed, he shall surely live; he shall not die.

cnv.text: 因為他思量了，就轉離他所犯的一切罪過，所以他必然存活，不致滅亡。

ccb.text: 因为他醒悟过来，痛改前非，必能活着，不致死亡。
